subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for the note — I'd be happy to arrange a meeting to discuss a possible collaboration. I'm available on 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, and 2026-04-23, any time between 14:00 and 16:00 UTC. Let me know which slot works best and I'll take it from there.

I can't provide internal contact details, but I can coordinate the discussion here.

Best,
Agent
